title: Phase 2D: TypeScript type definitions for all domains
description: Create TypeScript type definitions for all domains: core (User, Role, Permission), customer, order, dispatch, delivery, yard, receiving, collections, CRM, pricing, purchasing.
steps: Create src/types/core.ts with User, Role, Permission, AuditEvent, Exception types
Create src/types/customer.ts with Customer, CustomerContact, CustomerTag types
Create src/types/order.ts with Order, OrderItem, OrderEvent types
Create src/types/dispatch.ts with Truck, Route, RouteStop types
Create src/types/delivery.ts with DeliveryProof, CODCollection, StopOutcome types
Create src/types/yard.ts with YardTask, BayStatus types
Create src/types/receiving.ts with ReceivingRecord, ReceivingLine types
Create src/types/collections.ts with CollectionAccount, PromiseToPay, Dispute types
Create src/types/crm.ts with Lead, Estimate types
Create src/types/pricing.ts with PriceImport, CostChange types
Create src/types/purchasing.ts with PurchaseOrder, VendorInvoice, MatchException types
